modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unexpected Quarantine folder appears in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
User sees a folder named Quarantine in Outlook. They did not create this folder. It just appeared. This is confusing for the user. They want to know why it is there.
short_description: Unexpected Quarantine folder appears in Outlook.
description: User sees a folder named Quarantine in Outlook. They did not create this folder. It just appeared. This is confusing for the user. They want to know why it is there.
